label: plain_text
text:
Very often, exact numbers are not required and just an approximation
is sufficient. For
example, according to the 2011
census, the population
of
Chintamani
town
is
76,068. Instead,
saying
that
the
population
iS
about
75,000 is
enough
nto
give an
idea of how
big
the
quantity is.
